nodes.name: Cron — Monday 6 AM
nodes.notes: Weekly Monday 6 AM — researches competitors BARTCO, ARROWES, DATSA.

parameters.query: SELECT name, website, description FROM config_competitors WHERE active = true;

nodes.name: Research via Perplexity

messages.content: You are a competitive intelligence analyst for Traffic & Access Solutions, an Australian manufacturer of portable traffic management devices (PORTABOOM PB4000). Provide recent news and strategic moves.

Find recent news, product launches, pricing changes, customer reviews, and strategic moves for {{$json.name}} in the portable traffic management device industry in the last 7 days. Focus on the Australian market.

nodes.notes: Perplexity sonar-medium-online for live web search per competitor.

messages.content:
Extract structured intelligence from the following research about {{$json.name}}. Return JSON with keys: title (max 10 words), summary (max 3 sentences), relevance_score (1-10, where 10 = directly threatens TAS market position), tags (array of strings). If no meaningful intelligence found, set relevance_score to 1. Research:

{{$json.content}}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO canonical_agent_finding (agent_name, source, title, summary, raw_data, relevance_score, tags, metadata) VALUES ('competitor_intel', 'perplexity', $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, jsonb_build_object('competitor', $6)) RETURNING id;
INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, entity_id, source, metadata) VALUES ('AgentFindingCreated', 'agent_finding', $1, 'n8n', jsonb_build_object('agent', 'competitor_intel'));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('agent_competitor', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Weekly competitive intelligence. Researches BARTCO, ARROWES, DATSA via Perplexity. Claude extracts structured findings. Stores in canonical_agent_finding. From original Phase 2 Build Manual + TAS-001.3 (Section 2.1 competitive intelligence).
